title: SlideSpec
description: Per-slide JSON contract. One file per slide lives at spec/slides/{deck}/NN-name.json. JSON is the runtime source of truth.

slideNumber.description: Stable identity. Drives the URL (`/{slideNumber}`). Must be unique within a deck.

slideName.description: Lowercase, hyphenated. Used in the filename `NN-{slideName}.json`.

slideType.description: Selects the React renderer. Each type expects a different `content` shape — see slide-types catalog. `FocusTimelineSlide` and `AdvanceStepSlide` consume Next/Prev internally — see spec/slides/11-focus-timeline.md and spec/slides/18-advance-step-cinematic.md. `MetricGridSlide` renders 2-6 headline metric cells — see spec/slides/llm/22b-metric-grid-worked-example.md.

transition.description: How the slide enters/exits the stage. Vary across the deck — never repeat the same transition on three consecutive slides.

textAnimation.description: How text/content elements appear inside the slide once mounted.

enabled.description: Per-slide kill switch. When `false` the slide is excluded from `linearSlides`, the indicator total, and click-reveal targets. Deep-links to a disabled slide redirect to the first active slide. The file stays on disk so it can be restored by flipping back to `true`.

isClickReveal.description: When `true`, the slide is hidden from linear flow and only reachable via a parent capsule click. Requires `parentSlide`.

parentSlide.description: Required when `isClickReveal: true`. Pressing Next/Prev from the click-reveal returns to this slide.

showBrandHeader.description: Render the Riseup Asia logo in the top-left band (h-24).

showPresenterChip.description: Render the presenter pill (avatar + name) in the top-right band.

oneOf.description: Hide the deck-level brand strip on this slide.
Hide the deck-level brand strip on this slide.

logoAsset.description: Registered bundled logo asset. Preferred for export/import because the renderer resolves it to the built image URL.

logo.description: Direct image src for the primary logo. Use only for absolute/export-safe URLs; otherwise prefer `logoAsset`.

logoAlt.description: Alt text. Also used as the text-only fallback when no asset can resolve.

logoHeight.description: Logo height in px. Clamped 12–32 so it never overflows the 36px strip.

logoAlign.description: Horizontal position of the logo. When `right`, the tagline (if any) automatically moves to the left edge.

padding.description: Horizontal padding preset applied to both edges.

tagline.description: Tagline pill text, e.g. "Riseup Asia LLC · 2026 Deck". Anchored opposite the logo.

divider.description: Hairline gold divider under the strip.

brandStrip.description: Per-slide override of the deck-level branded strip. Omit to inherit `deck.brandStrip`. Set to `false` (or `null`) to hide on this slide. Pass an object to replace the deck default for this slide only.

oneOf.description: Explicitly disable the ambient layer for this slide.
Named ambient preset (icon set + sensible defaults). See spec 24 §6.

preset.description: Optional preset to seed icons/accents from before applying the overrides below.

glow.description: Render the soft radial amber glow above the icons.

parallax.description: Cursor parallax max-shift in px. 0 = off. Default 18.

ambientBackground.description: Opt-in ambient background layer (spec 24). String → preset name; object → preset + overrides; `false` or omitted → no ambient layer. StepTimelineSlide always renders its own ambient layer and ignores this field.

titleStyle.description: Title color treatment. `cream` (warm off-white, default), `white` (pure white, max contrast), `gold` (solid gold-glow). `gradient` is legacy — only use it if paired with `titleShimmer: true` so motion lives on top.

titleShimmer.description: Plays a one-shot diagonal highlight sweep across the title on entrance. Use this to add motion to a solid color instead of relying on a static gradient.

notes.description: Speaker-only narration shown in the Presenter view (`/present`). Plain text; newlines render as paragraph breaks. Never displayed to the audience.

sound.description: Optional per-slide audio cue. Synthesized in-browser (no asset). See spec/slides/21-sound-system.md.

on.description: When the cue fires. AdvanceStepSlide defaults to 'focus'; others default to 'enter'.

volume.description: Master gain for this cue. Defaults to 0.45.

mute.description: Hard mute for this slide regardless of `on`/`kind`.

content.description: Slide-type-specific payload. See `spec/slides/00-fundamentals.md` and the slide-types catalog for the shape per `slideType`.

eyebrow.description: Small uppercase tracker above the title.

title.description: Main heading. Use `\n` for explicit line breaks.

subtitle.description: One-line supporting statement under the title.

image.description: ImageSlide — relative path under the deck's images/ folder.

meetingUrl.description: QrMeetingSlide — live URL encoded into the QR. Per-slide override of `deck.meeting.url`.

qrUrl.description: Deprecated alias for `meetingUrl`. Kept for back-compat.

qrAsset.description: QrMeetingSlide — registered branded-QR slug. Wins over `meetingUrl` when both are set (treated as authored brand artwork).

meetingLabel.description: QrMeetingSlide — human-readable URL shown next to the QR. Per-slide override of `deck.meeting.label`.

qrStyle.description: QrMeetingSlide — visual treatment for the QR. `clean` = white tile + ink modules. `riseup-finder` = adds the brand red rounded finder squares + center wordmark pill (red lives only on the white card, never on the noir background). See spec/slides/12-contact-card.md.

contactRows.description: QrMeetingSlide contact-card layout — vertical icon+text rows next to the QR.

cta.description: QrMeetingSlide — primary call-to-action. When `cta.icon` is set, the button is rendered inline as a row of the contact list (Schedule a Call pattern); otherwise it sits below the list.

socials.description: QrMeetingSlide contact-card layout — bare social icons rendered below the CTA.

hotspots.description: Free-floating clickable regions overlaid on the slide. Independent of capsules — use to make any visual element (a word in the title, a region of an image, a step in a timeline) reveal a click-reveal slide.

metrics.description: MetricGridSlide cells. 2-6 entries; layout auto-derives from count (2→1×2, 3→1×3, 4→2×2, 5/6→2×3).

animations.description: Per-text-block animation overrides. Each key targets a content block. Value is either a preset name string OR an override object `{ preset, delayMs, durationMs, easing }` that pins timing so a fade-in or bounce reproduces identically across decks. See `TextAnimationOverride` in `src/slides/textAnimations.ts` for spring-channel semantics.

stepAmbient.description: StepTimelineSlide only — JSON-driven ambient icon scatter. Knobs and/or explicit positions. v0.83.

titleAmbient.description: TitleSlide only — JSON-driven hero ambient. v0.83.

headerOffsetPx.description: StepTimelineSlide only — horizontal nudge applied ONLY to the eyebrow + title block (not steps). Positive = right, negative = left. Range [-160, 160]. v0.85.

topOffsetPx.description: StepTimelineSlide only — VERTICAL nudge applied ONLY to the eyebrow + title block. Vertical companion to `headerOffsetPx`. Positive = down, negative = up. Range [-160, 160]. Step rows have their own `step.topOffsetPx`. v0.144.

baseDelayMs.description: Delay (ms) before the FIRST step row's reveal animation starts. Default 300. v0.145.

staggerMs.description: Additional delay (ms) added per row index — row `i` waits `baseDelayMs + i * staggerMs`. Default 180. Set 0 for simultaneous reveal. v0.145.

stepTiming.description: StepTimelineSlide only — slide-level enter/exit timing for every step row. String → preset shorthand; object → preset + per-direction overrides + reveal-order cadence (`baseDelayMs` / `staggerMs`). Per-step `step.enter` / `step.exit` win on top. Default 'smooth'. v0.90 — spec 49. v0.145 — order fields.

transitionTiming.description: Slide-level entrance/exit timing override. The `transition` enum sets the SHAPE of the motion; this block sets the TIMING. All fields optional — omitted ones fall back to the deck-wide default (550ms, expo-out cubic [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]). Required for blind-AI reproducibility — without this, two renderers can play the same transition at different speeds. v0.114.

durationMs.description: Animation length in ms. Clamped to [0, 4000]. Default 550.

delayMs.description: Pre-animation hold in ms. Clamped to [0, 4000]. Default 0.

easing.description: Named easing OR a cubic-bezier tuple. Default `[0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]` (expo-out).

capsuleLayout.description: CapsuleListSlide only — explicit layout knobs for the capsule row. When omitted, the slide falls back to the legacy flex-wrap auto-flow with 16px gap, opacity 1. Required for blind-AI reproducibility of label-capsule rows. v0.114. v0.146 — added rowGapPx, verticalAlign, capsuleOpacity.

columns.description: When set, the row uses an equal-width CSS grid with this many columns instead of flex-wrap.

gapPx.description: Column gap in px (and row gap when `rowGapPx` is omitted). Default 16.

rowGapPx.description: Vertical gap between WRAPPED rows in px. Falls back to `gapPx` when omitted. v0.146.

align.description: Horizontal alignment within the row. `between` only meaningful with the legacy flex-wrap path.

verticalAlign.description: Cross-axis alignment of capsules within the row. v0.146.

capsuleOpacity.description: Resting opacity for every capsule. Click-reveal dimming multiplies on top. Default 1. v0.146.

metricLayout.description: MetricGridSlide only — explicit grid overrides. When omitted, the grid auto-derives from `metrics.length` (2→1×2, 3→1×3, 4→2×2, 5/6→2×3) with default gaps and value sizes. v0.114.

gapXPx.description: Horizontal gap between cells in px. Default 48.

gapYPx.description: Vertical gap between cells in px. Default 56.

valueSize.description: Headline value font size — CSS clamp() string or single value (e.g. `"7rem"`). Default `"clamp(4rem, 9vw, 9rem)"`.

iconPool.description: Slugs from ambientIconRegistry (e.g. vscode, github-mark, code2).

positions.description: Explicit per-icon placements. When present, replaces the seeded scatter so the layout reproduces 1:1 in any renderer.

AnimationPreset.description: Reusable text-animation preset. `fadeIn` is the safe default. `slideInLeft` / `slideInRight` enter from the side. `pushLeft` / `pushRight` are stronger versions for hero blocks. `bounce` is a springy scale-in for a single hero element. `stagger` matches `fadeIn` but signals to parent containers to space children further apart. `cinematicCapsules` is a designer-grade blur→focus + slide-up + spring overshoot intended for capsule rows. `none` skips animation entirely.

oneOf.description: Override form. Pins the preset's timing so two slides using the same preset reproduce identically. `delayMs` always applies. `durationMs` and `easing` apply to tween channels; spring channels (used by `bounce`, `cinematicCapsules`) ignore them and follow physics.

delayMs.description: Delay before the block animates, ms. Stacks with parent stagger.

durationMs.description: Tween duration, ms. Ignored by spring channels (bounce/cinematicCapsules/titleSlide).

oneOf.description: Cubic-bezier control points [x1, y1, x2, y2].

easing.description: Easing curve. Replaces the preset's default.

CapsuleExpand.description: Shared inline-expand payload (spec 22 §3 / spec 26). Used by Capsule.expand, Step.expand, Hotspot.expand.

Hotspot.description: Free-floating click-reveal region. Must declare at least one of `revealSlide` (navigate) or `expand` (inline card). Spec 26.

revealSlide.description: Target slide number to navigate to on click. Optional when `expand` is set.

expand.description: Inline expanding-card payload. When set, click opens the card on the same slide.

x.description: Left edge as % of stage width.

y.description: Top edge as % of stage height.

style.description: `ghost` (default) is invisible until hover. `outline` shows a faint dashed box — useful while authoring.

value.description: Headline value rendered huge. Free-form string so authors keep control of units / prefixes / suffixes (e.g. '$4.2M', '99.9%', '<10ms').

label.description: Short label rendered under the value.

caption.description: Optional one-line caption rendered under the label.

accent.description: Accent color token applied to the value glyph.

color.description: Solid capsule color token. v0.25 added violet/teal/rose/sky for chromatic variety on multi-capsule slides.

clickRevealSlide.description: Legacy: navigate to a click-reveal slide. Superseded by `expand` when both are present. See spec 22.

hoverText.description: Hover label-flip target. Resting label rotates out, this rotates in. See spec 22 §2.

expand.description: Inline expanding-card payload — see CapsuleExpand. Wins over `clickRevealSlide` when both are present.

description.description: Long-form copy revealed when the step is the active/focused row in StepTimeline / FocusTimeline / AdvanceStep. Optional.

revealSlide.description: Spec 26 — navigate-style click-reveal target. Right detail panel auto-renders an 'Open' pill when set. Pair with destination slide's `isClickReveal: true` + `parentSlide`.

expand.description: Spec 26 — inline expanding-card payload. Wins over `revealSlide` when both are set.

revealLabel.description: Spec 26 — override label for the auto-rendered click-reveal CTA pill (e.g. 'See discovery details'). Defaults to 'Open details' (expand) or 'Open step page' (revealSlide).

leftOffsetPx.description: Per-step left padding (0–80) snapping the row to a guide. Triggers cinematic per-row reveal when > 0. Spec 40 §Reveal mode.

rightOffsetPx.description: Per-step right padding (0–160) snapping the row's right edge to a guide. Independent of leftOffsetPx; does NOT trigger reveal mode. v0.86 — spec 40 §Right-edge snap.

topOffsetPx.description: Per-step VERTICAL nudge in px (range -160..+160). Positive shifts the row down, negative up. Applied as transform: translateY so neighbours keep their natural slot. v0.90 — spec 49.

enter.description: Per-step ENTER timing override. Wins over slide-level `content.stepTiming`. v0.90 — spec 49. v0.144 — `offsetPx` pins the row's enter motion distance for reproducibility.

offsetPx.description: Translate-Y distance the row travels during enter, px. Positive starts BELOW its slot, negative ABOVE. Overlaid on the reveal mode's X motion. Omit to use the reveal-mode default (no Y motion).

exit.description: Per-step EXIT timing override. Mirrors `enter`. v0.90 — spec 49.

offsetPx.description: Translate-Y distance the row travels during exit, px. Positive ends BELOW its slot, negative ABOVE. Only takes effect when the row is wrapped in AnimatePresence.

cta.description: Per-step primary CTA pill rendered in the StepTimeline detail panel. Click plays the deck-wide click sound and either follows `href`, routes to `revealSlide`, or fires the deck onCta handler.

href.description: Optional external URL. Opens in a new tab when set.

revealMode.description: Per-step reveal SHAPE — independent of `enter` (which controls tempo). 'fade' = opacity only; 'slide' = legacy x:-24→0 + fade; 'pushLeft' = enter from the right (x:+24→0 + fade); 'timelineLand' = cinematic lands-onto-guide reveal (no longer requires leftOffsetPx > 0). Omit for legacy auto: leftOffsetPx>0 ⇒ timelineLand, else slide. Spec 53.

icon.description: Lucide icon slug rendered inside the amber-tinted tile.

text.description: Visible text. Use `\n` for an explicit line break (address blocks).

href.description: Optional link target — when present the row becomes an anchor (mailto:, tel:, https:).

icon.description: When set, the button is rendered inline as a row of the contact list with this icon (Schedule a Call pattern).

label.description: Accessible label override; defaults to the icon name.
